column8: "Who's that over there?""Oh, it's our new teacher,________just started work today."
column9: "Which CD did you get Marcus in the end?""I got him the one___________said he really wanted to hear."
column10: "Who did you send a Valentine's card to?""I'm not telling you, but it was someone__________name begins with "B"."
column11: "Have you seen Jason Green's latest film?""Is that the one in_____________joins the FBI?"
column12: "Why do you like Tina so much?""Well, she's one of the few people to_____________I can really talk."
column13: "Why don't we go to Lionel's for dinner tonight?""Is that the new restaurant________________has just opened on the other side of town?"
column14: "Could you lend me some money?""I'd like you to give me one good reason_________I should"
column15: "What do you want to do this summer?""I think we should go somewhere____________has plenty of sun and sand."
